zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Harestan於1212年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾桑迪亞可時，她的父親Richard de Harestan I39歲，母親Mrs. Richard de Harestan38歲。她於1225年與William de Grey of Sandiacre在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Harestan was born in 1212, in Sandiacre, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Harestan I, was 39 and her mother, Mrs. Richard de Harestan, was 38. She married William de Grey of Sandiacre in 1225, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Harestan est née en 1212, à Sandiacre, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Harestan I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard de Harestan, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé William de Grey of Sandiacre en 1225, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Harestan 1212 in Sandiacre, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Harestan I 39 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Richard de Harestan 38. Sie hat 1225 in England William de Grey of Sandiacre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Harestan è nata il nel 1212 nel Sandiacre, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Harestan I, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Richard de Harestan, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato William de Grey of Sandiacre nel 1225, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harestanが1212年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアサンディアクアで生まれた時，父Richard de Harestan Iは39歳，母Mrs. Richard de Harestanは38歳であった。1225年にイギリスでWilliam de Grey of Sandiacreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Harestan(이)가 1212년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 샌디아크르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Harestan I(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard de Harestan(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1225년 영국에서 William de Grey of Sandiacre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Harestan nasceu em 1212, em Sandiacre, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Harestan I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard de Harestan, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Grey of Sandiacre em 1225, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Harestan родилась в 1212 г. в местности сэндякр, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Harestan I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard de Harestan, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Grey of Sandiacre в 1225 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Harestan nació en 1212, en Sandiacre, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Harestan I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard de Harestan, tenía 38 años. Se casó con William de Grey of Sandiacre en 1225, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas.
